content.query:
SELECT cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [Customer Number]
    , [Customer Name]
    , SUM([ACAM]*-1) [Billed Freight Amount]
    , SUM(SD.[Sales Amt]) as Sales
    FROM M3.FGLEDG FG 
    JOIN (SELECT [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Invoice ID], SUM([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt] from a_SalesData SD 
              LEFT JOIN BI_ItemMaster MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.[Item Number] 
              WHERE MM.Division = 'Commercial'
              AND SD.Warehouse IN ('DFF', 'DIW', 'DFD', 'DFS')
              AND SD.[Sales Type] = 'Sales'
              GROUP BY [Invoice ID], [Customer ID], [Customer Name]
              ) SD
  on LEFT(SUBSTRING(FG.VTXT,CHARINDEX(' 24',FG.VTXT)+1,LEN(FG.VTXT)),10) = SD.[Invoice ID] 
    WHERE FG.AIT1 = '431010' 
    AND AIT7 = 'OI201401' 
    AND ACDT BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-10-31'
    GROUP BY [Customer ID] , [Customer Name]
